index.title: Touchpointe.digital | AI Agents Workshop for Students
index.heroSubtitle: A 2-day hands-on journey where students build their first AI-powered mini-projects. No prior coding experience needed.

whySection.heading: Why AI Training is
whySection.subtitle: AI isn't just coming; it's already here. Students who master it early lead the next generation.

points.title: Think Like a Creator
points.description: Don't just use apps; understand how the 'brain' behind them works. Learn to build with AI Agents that don't just chat, but act.

points.title: Future-Proof Careers
points.description: Every job in the future will involve AI. From medicine to art, being an 'AI Power User' is the most competitive skill today.

points.title: Responsible Tech
points.description: Understand the ethics, the risks of deepfakes, and how to use AI safely to help society rather than mislead.

whySection.costCta: Empowering students to be AI Leaders.

studentsSection.heading: Our Flagship
studentsSection.subtitle: Specifically designed for Class 8, 9 & 10 students in Kerala.

featuredProgram.title: AI AGENTS WORKSHOP
featuredProgram.description: Beginner level workshop available in English & Malayalam. Students use their smartphones to learn prompt engineering, research automation, and creative AI tools.

programs.title: Foundations & Prompting
programs.formats: Intro to AI • Chatbots vs Agents
programs.description: Learn the CRISP framework and the 'Robot Chef' analogy. Practice talking to AI to get perfect results for school tasks.

programs.title: Hands-On Building
programs.description: Become a Junior Journalist. Research, write, and generate artwork for a news report using tools like Gemini and Firefly.

programs.title: Ethics & Careers
programs.description: Deepfakes, privacy, and career paths like Prompt Engineering or AI Healthcare within the Kerala ecosystem.

footer.tagline: Empowering Class 8, 9 & 10 students in Kerala to lead the AI revolution through hands-on Agent workshops.

syllabus.title: Workshop Syllabus | AI Agents Workshop
syllabus.heading: AI Agents
syllabus.subtitle: A hands-on 2-day journey into the world of Artificial Intelligence and AI Agents. Designed for students in Kerala.

days.title: Session 1: What is AI? (9:10 AM - 10:00 AM)

slots.heading: Welcome & Intro:
slots.detail: Ice-breaker activity: 'Is this AI?'. Debate on Google Maps, calculators, and autocorrect.

slots.heading: The AI Brain:
slots.detail: Explain AI as systems that learn patterns vs rules. Live demo of Google Translate errors with Malayalam.

days.title: Session 2: What is an AI Agent? (10:00 AM - 10:50 AM)

slots.heading: Chatbot vs Agent:
slots.detail: A chatbot replies; an agent plans and acts (e.g., booking cabs, checking calendars).

slots.heading: The 4 Parts:
slots.detail: Perceive, Think, Act, and Remember. Group activity designing an AI agent for a scenarios.

days.title: Session 3: Agents Around Us (11:00 AM - 11:40 AM)

slots.heading: Live Demos:
slots.detail: Showcasing ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Suno AI (music), and Adobe Firefly (images).

slots.heading: Phone Hands-on:
slots.detail: Students use Google Gemini to generate custom study timetables.

slots.heading: CRISP Framework:
slots.detail: Context, Role, Instructions, Style, Purpose. Learning why quality input matters.

slots.heading: Prompt Challenge:
slots.detail: Bad vs Good prompt battle. Compare AI outputs for climate change topics.

slots.heading: Wrap-up:
slots.detail: Day 1 Quiz and Homework: Solve a real problem tonight using AI.

days.title: Session 1: Agent Types & Creative AI (9:15 AM - 11:30 AM)

slots.heading: Homework Share:
slots.detail: Students discuss their AI experiments from the previous evening.

slots.heading: Exploring GenAI:
slots.detail: Conversational, Research, Coding, and Creative agents. Generate a song with Suno AI.

slots.heading: Practical: Junior Journalist:
slots.detail: Individual/Pair project. Research, write, and generate artwork for a news report using smartphones.

slots.heading: Risks Explained:
slots.detail: Deepfakes, misinformation, and privacy concerns. The 'AI Court' debate activity.

slots.heading: The Kerala Angle:
slots.detail: Discussing Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM) and localized AI initiatives.

slots.heading: AI Career Paths:
slots.detail: Prompt Engineers, AI Builders, and Data Analysts. Free resources like CS50 and Google Learn.

slots.heading: Grand Closing:
slots.detail: Project showcase, top 3 announcements, and distribution of participation certificates.

metadata.title: AI Agents Workshop for Students | TouchPointe Digital
metadata.description: A 2-day intensive AI workshop for Class 8-10 students in Kerala. Learn AI Agents, Prompting, and build real projects.

hero.title: Build the Future with AI Agents
hero.description: No coding needed. Just your smartphone and a curious mind. Join our 2-day workshop to transition from a social media user to an AI creator.

about.title: A Beginner Friendly Journey
paragraphs: This 2-day workshop introduces school students to Artificial Intelligence and AI Agents in a simple, fun, and practical way. Students will learn what AI is, how AI agents work, and get hands-on experience using real AI tools on their smartphones.
We focus on the difference between a chatbot and an AI agent, mastering prompt engineering, and exploring growing career paths in the AI Era right here in Kerala.

hattiAi.title: The Agent Workflow
hattiAi.subtitle: Learn how professionals use AI to work 10x faster.
hattiAi.description: We teach the precise stages of an AI Agent: Perceive, Think, Act, and Remember. During the workshop, you will use this framework to complete your Junior Journalist project.

features.title: Prompt Mastery
features.description: Use the CRISP framework to talk to AI like a pro and get perfect results every time.

features.title: Creative GenAI
features.description: Generate music with Suno AI and high-quality artwork with Adobe Firefly on your phone.

features.title: Junior Journalist
features.description: Research, write, and publish your own news report using automated AI workflows.

learnItems.title: Chatbots vs. Agents
learnItems.description: Understanding why agents are the next step beyond simple text replies.

learnItems.title: Prompt Engineering
learnItems.description: Mastering the role-based prompt frameworks to get accurate AI data.

learnItems.title: Practical Projects
learnItems.description: Completing a Journalist mini-project with research, writing, and image GenAI.

learnItems.title: Ethics & Careers
learnItems.description: Learning about deepfakes, misinformation, and the AI jobs of tomorrow.

trainer.title: Hands-on Lab Environment
trainer.description: Join 20-40 fellow students in a collaborative setting. Our facilitators guide you through live demos and smartphone activities to ensure every student completes their project.

cta.title: Secure Your Slot Today
cta.description: Join our 2-day AI Agents workshop and build your first AI project. limited seats available per batch.

footer.description: Designed for students in Kerala to master Artificial Intelligence and AI Agents in a simple, practical way.
